author: Chidera Ibe
name: ProRes + LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training
blurb: 10-layer baseline with Progressive Residual Warmup (arXiv:2603.05369, March 2026), LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation, lzma compression, LAWA checkpoint averaging, ramping weight decay (0.02→0.08), and validation set training. 26 experiments including recursive transformers, differential attention (ICLR 2025), Mamba SSM, gated attention (NeurIPS 2025), harmonic loss, VRL, and more. Run on 1xH100 SXM.
